neqsim.process.allocation
Linear recovery-factor production allocation (proxy network).

    double
    AllocationUncertaintyEstimator.UncertaintyResult.getProductAllocationStdDev(String source, ProductType productType, String unit)
    Gets the one-sigma standard deviation of the total product allocation of a given type for a source, summed over all custody outlets of that product type.
    double
    ProductionAllocationResult.getProductTotal(ProductType productType, String unit)
    Gets the field-wide total flow delivered to all custody outlets of a given product category, summed over every source and component.

    Propagates independent metering noise through the proxy network with explicit topology and label arrays.
